brand.description: Brand snapshot from the chosen Legenex campaign.

campaign_id.description: Reference to the Legenex Campaign this form's leads belong to.

connection_id.description: Reference to the MetaConnection whose token can read this form.

enabled.description: When false this form is ignored entirely.

field_map.description: JSON object mapping Meta lead field names to Legenex lead fields, for example {"email":"email","phone_number":"mobile"}.

ingest_mode.description: disabled = mapping stored but nothing is ingested. reporting_only = leads imported for reporting without distribution. process_lead = leads enter the live pipeline. Ingestion is wired separately; disabled is the safe default.

last_error.description: Last ingestion error message. Empty when healthy.

leads_ingested.description: Running count of leads ingested through this form mapping.

page_id.description: Meta Page that owns the form.

supplier_id.description: Reference to the Supplier these leads are attributed to (the source).

vertical.description: Vertical snapshot from the chosen Legenex campaign.
